component.name: View Notes
component.description: Card grouping field notes: warm **Unassigned** band (`Foundation/Background/Default` + `Typography/LABEL` secondary), stacked rows with 16px activity icon + `Typography/Body` excerpt + `Typography/Body-Small` date. **Notes Multi Session** adds a top-divided block with the same band behind **{date} SESSION** and additional rows (e.g. material-styled line in reference). The Figma file uses a vertical stack of variant masters under the `View Notes` component set.

figmaLayerNames.componentSet: View Notes (vertical stack of variant masters, 16px gap)

codeProps.unassignedNotes: ViewNotesNoteItem[] — use two items for Same Session, one for Single / Multi (first block)
codeProps.sessionBlock: optional { sessionDateLabel, notes }; rendered only when variant is notesMultiSession and notes.length > 0

notes: 2026-04-07: `ViewNotesCard` in `view-notes/` from Figma `1287:432`. Icons via `QuickCaptureTileIcon` scaled to ~16px.

2026-04-10: Figma cleaned up to a vertical `COMPONENT_SET` stack with 16px gap and kebab-case structural wrappers (`view-notes-card`, `view-notes-card-surface`, `view-notes-bucket-header`, `view-notes-note-row`, `view-notes-session-section`, etc.). Wrapper / row frames no longer use generic `Container` / `Frame` labels. No `flatten()` introduced in automation.
